underlying_goal: Squash git commits and push, then fix a yt-dlp JavaScript runtime dependency issue in their Docker-based jellyfin-downloader project
friction_detail: Deno install failed because unzip was missing from the Docker image's apt packages, requiring a follow-up fix.
brief_summary: User wanted to squash commits and fix a yt-dlp JS runtime issue in Docker; both were achieved with one minor missing-dependency hiccup.
